summary: Employee Invitation System feature testing completed successfully. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows verified working: admin creates invitation, code generated with copy functionality, pending invitations tab, revoke invitations, signup with invitation code validation (green checkmark for valid, error for invalid), employee signup with valid code, admin signup with admin code.
critical_code_review_comments: Invitation code format (INV-XXXXXX) is user-friendly and easy to share
Real-time validation on signup page provides good UX with green checkmark for valid codes
Email pre-fill from invitation reduces user friction during signup
Proper error handling for invalid/expired/revoked codes
Admin/Employee signup toggle works correctly, hiding irrelevant fields
Copy code and copy signup link buttons improve admin workflow
data-testid attributes properly added for all interactive elements
seed_data_creation: Multiple test invitations created during testing with TEST_ prefix emails
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee Invitation System fully implemented and tested. Features verified: 1) Admin can create invitations from Employees page via 'Invite Employee' button, 2) Invitation codes generated in format INV-XXXXXX, 3) Success modal shows code with copy button and copy signup link option, 4) Pending Invitations tab shows all invitations with status (pending/accepted/revoked/expired), 5) Admin can revoke pending invitations, 6) Signup page requires invitation code for employees, 7) Real-time code validation with green checkmark for valid codes, 8) Email pre-filled from invitation, 9) Employee cannot signup without code or with invalid code, 10) Admin signup still works with ARBORBLOOM-ADMIN-2025 code.

admin_create_invitation.details: Admin can click 'Invite Employee' button, enter email/department, generate code

invitation_code_generation.details: Codes generated in INV-XXXXXX format, displayed in success modal with copy functionality

pending_invitations_tab.details: Tab shows all invitations with Email, Code, Status, Expires columns

revoke_invitation.details: Admin can revoke pending invitations, revoked codes become invalid

signup_requires_invitation_code.details: Employee signup fails without invitation code (403 error)

signup_code_validation.details: Real-time validation shows green checkmark for valid codes, error for invalid

employee_signup_with_valid_code.details: Employee can signup with valid code, redirected to employee dashboard

signup_invalid_code_rejected.details: Signup with invalid/expired/revoked code returns 403 error

admin_signup_with_admin_code.details: Admin signup with ARBORBLOOM-ADMIN-2025 works, redirected to admin dashboard

email_mismatch_rejected.details: Signup with different email than invitation is rejected

duplicate_invitation_rejected.details: Cannot create duplicate pending invitation for same email

accepted_code_cannot_be_reused.details: Once invitation is accepted, code cannot be used again

api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/auth/signup (admin with code): PASS - Admin signup with admin code
